# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDBAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "kind": "FunctionApp",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('functionPlan'))]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Identity",
          "apiVersion": "2018-06-01",
          "name": "[parameters('functionName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "principalId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')).id]",
            "clientId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')).name]"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
          "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('functionName'), '/systemAssignedManagedIdentity')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "defaultAuthenticationType": "ActiveDirectory",
            "mscManagementMode": "SystemAssigned"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
          "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
          "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
          "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
          "apiVersion": "2018-02-14",
          "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
          "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
          "apiVersion": "2015-08-01-preview",
          "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
          "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
          "apiVersion": "2021-04-15",
          "name": "[parameters('cosmosDBAccountName')]",
          "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName'))]"
    },
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    }
  }
}
